variables.input:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter $CostAllocation == "costcenter"
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT"
| fieldsAdd value = coalesce(dt.cost.costcenter, $unassigned)
| summarize count(), by: {value}
| fieldsKeep value
| append [
  fetch dt.system.events
  | filter $CostAllocation == "product"
  | filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT"
  | fieldsAdd value = coalesce(dt.cost.product, $unassigned)
  | summarize count(), by: {value}
  | fieldsKeep value
]

fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT"
| expand dt.cost.costcenter
| fieldsAdd dt.cost.costcenter = coalesce(dt.cost.costcenter[key], dt.cost.costcenter)
| expand dt.cost.product
| fieldsAdd dt.cost.product = coalesce(dt.cost.product[key], dt.cost.product)
| filter $SupportedCapabilitiesOnly == "no" OR isNotNull(dt.cost.costcenter) OR isNotNull(dt.cost.product)
| fields event.type
| dedup event.type

/*
* This will run JavaScript in the DYNATRACE
* serverless environment.
* To generate variable options return string array.
*/
export default async function () {
  return `[
  {"key":"AUTOMATIONS","name":"Automation Workflow","price":"0.13","currencyCode":"USD"},
  {"key":"BUSINESS_EVENTS_ANALYZE","name":"Events - Query","price":"0.0035","currencyCode":"USD"},
  {"key":"BUSINESS_EVENTS_INGEST","name":"Events - Ingest & Process","price":"0.2","currencyCode":"USD"},
  {"key":"BUSINESS_EVENTS_RETAIN","name":"Events - Retain","price":"0.0007","currencyCode":"USD"},
  {"key":"CODE_MONITORING","name":"Code Monitoring","price":"0.005","currencyCode":"USD"},
  {"key":"COMPUTE","name":"AppEngine Functions - Small","price":"0.001","currencyCode":"USD"},
  {"key":"EVENTS","name":"Custom Events Classic","price":"0.000002","currencyCode":"USD"},
  {"key":"FOUNDATION_AND_DISCOVERY","name":"Foundation & Discovery","price":"0.01","currencyCode":"USD"},
  {"key":"FULLSTACK_MONITORING","name":"Full-Stack Monitoring","price":"0.01","currencyCode":"USD"},
  {"key":"INFRASTRUCTURE_MONITORING","name":"Infrastructure Monitoring","price":"0.04","currencyCode":"USD"},
  {"key":"KUBERNETES_OPERATIONS","name":"Kubernetes Platform Monitoring","price":"0.002","currencyCode":"USD"},
  {"key":"LOG_MANAGEMENT_ANALYZE","name":"Log Management & Analytics - Query","price":"0.0035","currencyCode":"USD"},
  {"key":"LOG_MANAGEMENT_INGEST","name":"Log Management & Analytics - Ingest & Process","price":"0.2","currencyCode":"USD"},
  {"key":"LOG_MANAGEMENT_RETAIN","name":"Log Management & Analytics - Retain","price":"0.0007","currencyCode":"USD"},
  {"key":"LOGS","name":"Log Monitoring Classic","price":"0.000001","currencyCode":"USD"},
  {"key":"MAINFRAME_MONITORING","name":"Mainframe Monitoring","price":"0.1","currencyCode":"USD"},
  {"key":"METRICS","name":"Custom Metrics Classic","price":"0.000002","currencyCode":"USD"},
  {"key":"RUNTIME_APPLICATION_PROTECTION","name":"Runtime Application Protection","price":"0.00225","currencyCode":"USD"},
  {"key":"RUNTIME_VULNERABILITY_ANALYTICS","name":"Runtime Vulnerability Analytics","price":"0.00225","currencyCode":"USD"},
  {"key":"SECURITY_POSTURE_MANAGEMENT","name":"Security Posture Management","price":"0","currencyCode":"USD"},
  {"key":"SERVERLESS","name":"Serverless Functions Classic","price":"0.000004","currencyCode":"USD"},
  {"key":"SYNTHETIC_MONITORING_BROWSER","name":"Browser Monitor or Clickpath","price":"0.009","currencyCode":"USD"},
  {"key":"SYNTHETIC_MONITORING_HTTP","name":"HTTP Monitor","price":"0.001","currencyCode":"USD"},
  {"key":"SYNTHETIC_MONITORING_THIRD_PARTY","name":"Third-Party Synthetic API Ingestion","price":"0.001","currencyCode":"USD"},
  {"key":"TRACE_INGEST","name":"Traces - Ingest \& Process","price":"0.2","currencyCode":"USD"},
  {"key":"TRACE_QUERY","name":"Traces - Query","price":"0.0035","currencyCode":"USD"},
  {"key":"TRACE_RETAIN","name":"Traces - Retain","price":"0.0007","currencyCode":"USD"},
  {"key":"TRACES","name":"Custom Traces Classic","price":"0.0000014","currencyCode":"USD"},
  {"key":"USER_SESSION_PROPERTIES","name":"Real User Monitoring Property","price":"0.0001","currencyCode":"USD"},
  {"key":"USER_SESSION_REPLAYS","name":"Real User Monitoring with Session Replay","price":"0.009","currencyCode":"USD"},
  {"key":"USER_SESSIONS","name":"Real User Monitoring","price":"0.00225","currencyCode":"USD"}
]`
}

33.content:
## Disclaimer
* ensure to adopt the ratecard_data variable
* Usage of the Dashboard is free of charge

36.title: Capability / Cost center Heatmap
36.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT"
| filterOut event.type =="Traces - Ingest & Process" //traces need special handling
| dedup event.id
| filter in(event.type, {$Capability})
| fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
| fieldsAdd costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation), $unassigned, else: costallocation)
| fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
| expand costallocation
| fieldsAdd filter = coalesce(costallocation[key], costallocation)
| filter in(filter, {$Filter})
| fieldsAdd billed_bytes = coalesce(costallocation[billed_bytes], billed_bytes)
| fieldsAdd usage = coalesce(
    billed_host_hours, //Infra, F&D
    billed_gibibyte_hours, //Fullstack, Runtime Application Protection, Runtime Vulnerability Analytics
    toDouble(billed_bytes) / (1024*1024*1024), //ALL I/R/Q
    billed_invocations, //AppEngine
    ingested_bytes,
    1 //workflow count
    )
| fieldsAdd usage.start = if(isNull(usage.start), timestamp, else: usage.start)
| makeTimeseries interval: 15m, time: usage.start, nonempty:false, by:{filter, event.type },{
  usage = sum(usage)
}
| append [
// THIS IS JUST FOR TRACES INGEST NORMALIZATION ----->


      FETCH dt.system.events
      | filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and event.type == "Traces - Ingest & Process"
      | filter in(event.type, {$Capability})
      | fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
      | fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
      | fieldsAdd filter = costallocation
      | filter in(filter, {$Filter})
      | fieldsKeep usage.start, licensing_type, ingested_bytes, costallocation, event.id
      | dedup event.id
      | fieldsAdd licensing_type = if(in(licensing_type, {
        "otlp-trace-ingest", "serverless"}), "other", else: licensing_type)
      
      | fieldsAdd adaptive_volume = if(licensing_type == "fullstack-adaptive", ingested_bytes)
      | fieldsAdd fixed_rate_volume = if(licensing_type == "fullstack-fixed-rate", ingested_bytes)
      | fieldsAdd other_volume = if(licensing_type == "other", ingested_bytes)
    
      | fieldsAdd costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation), $unassigned, else: costallocation)
      
      | makeTimeseries interval: 15m, time: usage.start, by: {
        costallocation}, nonempty: true, {
        adaptive_volume = sum(adaptive_volume, default: 0),
        fixed_rate_volume = sum(fixed_rate_volume, default: 0),
        other_volume = sum(other_volume, default: 0)
      }
      
        // calculate included volume per costcenter and join with trace-ingest usage
      | join [
          FETCH dt.system.events
          | filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT"
          | filter event.type == "Full-Stack Monitoring"
          | fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
          | fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
          | fieldsKeep usage.start, billed_gibibyte_hours, costallocation, event.id
          | dedup event.id
          | makeTimeseries {
            billed = sum(billed_gibibyte_hours) }, by: {
            costallocation }, time: usage.start, interval: 15m
          | summarize by: {
            timeframe, interval }, {
            total = sum(billed[]), r = collectArray(record(costallocation, billed)) }
          | expand r
          | fieldsFlatten r, fields: {
            costallocation, billed }
          | fieldsAdd ratio = billed[] / total[]
          | fields timeframe, interval, costallocation, ratio
          | join [
              timeseries interval: 15m, union: true, nonempty: true, {
                included_volume = max(dt.billing.traces.maximum_included_fullstack_volume_per_minute, default: null),
                configured_volume = max(dt.billing.traces.maximum_configured_fullstack_volume_per_minute, default: null)
              }
              | fieldsAdd interval_in_minutes = toLong(interval) / 60000000000
              | fieldsAdd extra_ingest_on = configured_volume[] > included_volume[]
              | fieldsAdd included_volume = interval_in_minutes * if(isNull(configured_volume[]), null, else: included_volume[])
          ], on: {
            timeframe, interval }, fields: {
            included_volume, extra_ingest_on }
          | fieldsAdd included_volume_costallocation = included_volume[] * ratio[]
          | fieldsAdd costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation), $unassigned, else: costallocation)
      ], on: {
        timeframe, interval, costallocation }, kind: outer, prefix: "included."
      
      | fieldsAdd timeframe = coalesce(timeframe, included.timeframe)
      | fieldsAdd interval = coalesce(interval, included.interval)
      | fieldsAdd costallocation = coalesce(costallocation, included.costallocation)
      | fieldsAdd
          extra_ingest_on =
              if(exists(included.extra_ingest_on) and isNotNull(included.extra_ingest_on), included.extra_ingest_on,
                else: array(false, false, false, false))
      
      | fieldsAdd included_volume_costallocation = included.included_volume_costallocation
        // replace nulls with 0
      | fieldsAdd adaptive_volume = iCollectArray(coalesce(adaptive_volume[], 0))
      | fieldsAdd fixed_rate_volume = iCollectArray(coalesce(fixed_rate_volume[], 0))
      | fieldsAdd other_volume = iCollectArray(coalesce(other_volume[], 0))
      
      | fieldsKeep timeframe, interval, costallocation, adaptive_volume, fixed_rate_volume, other_volume,
          included_volume_costallocation, extra_ingest_on
      
        // calculate fullstack trace-ingest usage per costcenter
      | fieldsAdd license_remaining = included_volume_costallocation[] - adaptive_volume[]
      | fieldsAdd license_remaining = if(license_remaining[] > 0, license_remaining[], else: 0)
      
      | fieldsAdd
          billable_fullstack =
              if(isNull(included_volume_costallocation[]), 0,
                else: if(extra_ingest_on[], adaptive_volume[] + fixed_rate_volume[] - included_volume_costallocation[],
                  else: fixed_rate_volume[] - license_remaining[]))
      
      | fieldsAdd billable_fullstack = if(billable_fullstack[] > 0, billable_fullstack[], else: 0)
      
      | summarize {
        total_included = sum(included_volume_costallocation[]),
        total_adaptive = sum(adaptive_volume[]),
        total_fixed_rate = sum(fixed_rate_volume[]),
        total_fullstack_to_allocate = sum(billable_fullstack[]),
        per_costallocation = collectArray(record(extra_ingest_on, billable_fullstack, billable_other = other_volume, costallocation, included_volume_costallocation))}, 
        by: { timeframe, interval }
      | expand per_costallocation
      | fieldsFlatten per_costallocation
      | fieldsRemove per_costallocation
      
      | fieldsAdd total_license_remaining = total_included[] - total_adaptive[]
      | fieldsAdd total_license_remaining = if(total_license_remaining[] > 0, total_license_remaining[], else: 0)
      | fieldsAdd
          total_applicable_fullstack =
              if(isNull(per_costallocation.included_volume_costallocation), 0,
                else: if(per_costallocation.extra_ingest_on[], total_adaptive[] + total_fixed_rate[] - total_included[],
                  else: total_fixed_rate[] - total_license_remaining[]))
      | fieldsAdd total_billable_fullstack = if(total_applicable_fullstack[] > 0, total_applicable_fullstack[], else: 0)
      
      | fieldsAdd
          distributed_fullstack =
              if(total_fullstack_to_allocate[] <= 0, 0,
                else: per_costallocation.billable_fullstack[] / total_fullstack_to_allocate[] * total_billable_fullstack[])
      // filter out  entry if the included was not fetched
      | fieldsAdd
          adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation =
              per_costallocation.billable_other[] + if(total_included[] == 0, null, else: toDouble(distributed_fullstack[]))
      | filterOut isNull(adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation)
      
      | fields timeframe, interval, costallocation = per_costallocation.costallocation, adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation
      | fieldsAdd event.type ="Traces - Ingest & Process"
      | fieldsAdd filter = costallocation
]
| fieldsAdd traces_usage = adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation[] / (1024*1024*1024)
// <---------THIS IS JUST FOR TRACES INGEST NORMALIZATION 


| lookup [
   data json:$ratecard_data
], sourceField:event.type, lookupField:name, prefix: "ratecard."
| fieldsAdd isnull = isNull(adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation)
| fieldsAdd usage = if(isnull, usage, else: traces_usage)
| fieldsKeep timeframe, interval, costallocation, event.type, usage,ratecard.price, filter
| fieldsAdd cost = usage[] * toDouble(ratecard.price)
| fieldsAdd cost = arraySum(cost)
| fieldsAdd usage = arraySum(usage)
| summarize {sum(usage), sum(cost)}, by:{event.type, filter}

38.query:
fetch dt.system.events

| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT"
| filterOut event.type =="Traces - Ingest & Process" //traces need special handling
| dedup event.id
| filter in(event.type, {$Capability})
| fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
| fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
| expand costallocation
| fieldsAdd filter = coalesce(costallocation[key], costallocation)
| filter in(filter, {$Filter})
| fieldsAdd billed_bytes = coalesce(costallocation[billed_bytes], billed_bytes)
| fieldsAdd usage = coalesce(
    billed_host_hours, //Infra, F&D
    billed_gibibyte_hours, //Fullstack, Runtime Application Protection, Runtime Vulnerability Analytics
    toDouble(billed_bytes) / (1024*1024*1024), //ALL I/R/Q
    billed_invocations, //AppEngine
    ingested_bytes,
    1 //workflow count
    )
| fieldsAdd entityName(dt.entity.host)
| fieldsAdd usage.start = if(isNull(usage.start), timestamp, else: usage.start)
| append [
// THIS IS JUST FOR TRACES INGEST NORMALIZATION ----->
      FETCH dt.system.events
      | filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and event.type == "Traces - Ingest & Process"
      | fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
      | fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
      | fieldsAdd filter = costallocation
      | filter in(filter, {$Filter})
      | fieldsAdd usage = toDouble(ingested_bytes) / (1024*1024*1024)
]

| lookup [
   data json:$ratecard_data
], sourceField:event.type, lookupField:name, prefix: "ratecard."
| fieldsAdd cost = if(event.type == "Traces - Ingest & Process", "not applicable*", else:usage * toDouble(ratecard.price))
| fieldsRename currency = ratecard.currencyCode, capability = event.type, price = ratecard.price
| fieldsKeep usage.start, usage.end, capability, filter, usage, cost, price, currency, dt.entity.host.name, billed_bytes, application_only_type, dt.openpipeline.pipelines, dt.entity.host, billed_container_hours, dt.openpipeline.source, billed_gibibyte_hours, k8s.cluster.uid, k8s.namespace.name, ingested_bytes, ingested_spans, licensing_type
| sort filter, usage.start, capability

40.title: Estimated Costs per capability and $CostAllocation

47.title: Estimated Costs per capability
47.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT"
| filterOut event.type =="Traces - Ingest & Process" //traces need special handling
| dedup event.id
| filter in(event.type, {$Capability})
| fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
| fieldsAdd costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation), $unassigned, else: costallocation)
| fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
| expand costallocation
| fieldsAdd filter = coalesce(costallocation[key], costallocation)
| filter in(filter, {$Filter})
| fieldsAdd billed_bytes = coalesce(costallocation[billed_bytes], billed_bytes)
| fieldsAdd usage = coalesce(
    billed_host_hours, //Infra, F&D
    billed_gibibyte_hours, //Fullstack, Runtime Application Protection, Runtime Vulnerability Analytics
    toDouble(billed_bytes) / (1024*1024*1024), //ALL I/R/Q
    billed_invocations, //AppEngine
    ingested_bytes,
    1 //workflow count
    )
| fieldsAdd usage.start = if(isNull(usage.start), timestamp, else: usage.start)
| makeTimeseries interval: 15m, time: usage.start, nonempty:false, by:{filter, event.type },{
  usage = sum(usage)
}
| append [
// THIS IS JUST FOR TRACES INGEST NORMALIZATION ----->


      FETCH dt.system.events
      | filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and event.type == "Traces - Ingest & Process"
      | filter in(event.type, {$Capability})
      | fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
      | fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
      | fieldsAdd filter = costallocation
      | filter in(filter, {$Filter})
      | fieldsKeep usage.start, licensing_type, ingested_bytes, costallocation, event.id
      | dedup event.id
      | fieldsAdd licensing_type = if(in(licensing_type, {
        "otlp-trace-ingest", "serverless"}), "other", else: licensing_type)
      
      | fieldsAdd adaptive_volume = if(licensing_type == "fullstack-adaptive", ingested_bytes)
      | fieldsAdd fixed_rate_volume = if(licensing_type == "fullstack-fixed-rate", ingested_bytes)
      | fieldsAdd other_volume = if(licensing_type == "other", ingested_bytes)
    
      | fieldsAdd costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation), $unassigned, else: costallocation)
      
      | makeTimeseries interval: 15m, time: usage.start, by: {
        costallocation}, nonempty: true, {
        adaptive_volume = sum(adaptive_volume, default: 0),
        fixed_rate_volume = sum(fixed_rate_volume, default: 0),
        other_volume = sum(other_volume, default: 0)
      }
      
        // calculate included volume per costcenter and join with trace-ingest usage
      | join [
          FETCH dt.system.events
          | filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT"
          | filter event.type == "Full-Stack Monitoring"
          | fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
          | fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
          | fieldsKeep usage.start, billed_gibibyte_hours, costallocation, event.id
          | dedup event.id
          | makeTimeseries {
            billed = sum(billed_gibibyte_hours) }, by: {
            costallocation }, time: usage.start, interval: 15m
          | summarize by: {
            timeframe, interval }, {
            total = sum(billed[]), r = collectArray(record(costallocation, billed)) }
          | expand r
          | fieldsFlatten r, fields: {
            costallocation, billed }
          | fieldsAdd ratio = billed[] / total[]
          | fields timeframe, interval, costallocation, ratio
          | join [
              timeseries interval: 15m, union: true, nonempty: true, {
                included_volume = max(dt.billing.traces.maximum_included_fullstack_volume_per_minute, default: null),
                configured_volume = max(dt.billing.traces.maximum_configured_fullstack_volume_per_minute, default: null)
              }
              | fieldsAdd interval_in_minutes = toLong(interval) / 60000000000
              | fieldsAdd extra_ingest_on = configured_volume[] > included_volume[]
              | fieldsAdd included_volume = interval_in_minutes * if(isNull(configured_volume[]), null, else: included_volume[])
          ], on: {
            timeframe, interval }, fields: {
            included_volume, extra_ingest_on }
          | fieldsAdd included_volume_costallocation = included_volume[] * ratio[]
          | fieldsAdd costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation), $unassigned, else: costallocation)
      ], on: {
        timeframe, interval, costallocation }, kind: outer, prefix: "included."
      
      | fieldsAdd timeframe = coalesce(timeframe, included.timeframe)
      | fieldsAdd interval = coalesce(interval, included.interval)
      | fieldsAdd costallocation = coalesce(costallocation, included.costallocation)
      | fieldsAdd
          extra_ingest_on =
              if(exists(included.extra_ingest_on) and isNotNull(included.extra_ingest_on), included.extra_ingest_on,
                else: array(false, false, false, false))
      
      | fieldsAdd included_volume_costallocation = included.included_volume_costallocation
        // replace nulls with 0
      | fieldsAdd adaptive_volume = iCollectArray(coalesce(adaptive_volume[], 0))
      | fieldsAdd fixed_rate_volume = iCollectArray(coalesce(fixed_rate_volume[], 0))
      | fieldsAdd other_volume = iCollectArray(coalesce(other_volume[], 0))
      
      | fieldsKeep timeframe, interval, costallocation, adaptive_volume, fixed_rate_volume, other_volume,
          included_volume_costallocation, extra_ingest_on
      
        // calculate fullstack trace-ingest usage per costcenter
      | fieldsAdd license_remaining = included_volume_costallocation[] - adaptive_volume[]
      | fieldsAdd license_remaining = if(license_remaining[] > 0, license_remaining[], else: 0)
      
      | fieldsAdd
          billable_fullstack =
              if(isNull(included_volume_costallocation[]), 0,
                else: if(extra_ingest_on[], adaptive_volume[] + fixed_rate_volume[] - included_volume_costallocation[],
                  else: fixed_rate_volume[] - license_remaining[]))
      
      | fieldsAdd billable_fullstack = if(billable_fullstack[] > 0, billable_fullstack[], else: 0)
      
      | summarize {
        total_included = sum(included_volume_costallocation[]),
        total_adaptive = sum(adaptive_volume[]),
        total_fixed_rate = sum(fixed_rate_volume[]),
        total_fullstack_to_allocate = sum(billable_fullstack[]),
        per_costallocation = collectArray(record(extra_ingest_on, billable_fullstack, billable_other = other_volume, costallocation, included_volume_costallocation))}, 
        by: { timeframe, interval }
      | expand per_costallocation
      | fieldsFlatten per_costallocation
      | fieldsRemove per_costallocation
      
      | fieldsAdd total_license_remaining = total_included[] - total_adaptive[]
      | fieldsAdd total_license_remaining = if(total_license_remaining[] > 0, total_license_remaining[], else: 0)
      | fieldsAdd
          total_applicable_fullstack =
              if(isNull(per_costallocation.included_volume_costallocation), 0,
                else: if(per_costallocation.extra_ingest_on[], total_adaptive[] + total_fixed_rate[] - total_included[],
                  else: total_fixed_rate[] - total_license_remaining[]))
      | fieldsAdd total_billable_fullstack = if(total_applicable_fullstack[] > 0, total_applicable_fullstack[], else: 0)
      
      | fieldsAdd
          distributed_fullstack =
              if(total_fullstack_to_allocate[] <= 0, 0,
                else: per_costallocation.billable_fullstack[] / total_fullstack_to_allocate[] * total_billable_fullstack[])
      // filter out  entry if the included was not fetched
      | fieldsAdd
          adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation =
              per_costallocation.billable_other[] + if(total_included[] == 0, null, else: toDouble(distributed_fullstack[]))
      | filterOut isNull(adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation)
      
      | fields timeframe, interval, costallocation = per_costallocation.costallocation, adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation
      | fieldsAdd event.type ="Traces - Ingest & Process"
      | fieldsAdd filter = costallocation
]
| fieldsAdd traces_usage = adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation[] / (1024*1024*1024)
// <---------THIS IS JUST FOR TRACES INGEST NORMALIZATION 

| lookup [
   data json:$ratecard_data
], sourceField:event.type, lookupField:name, prefix: "ratecard."
| fieldsAdd isnull = isNull(adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation)
| fieldsAdd usage = if(isnull, usage, else: traces_usage)
| fieldsKeep timeframe, interval, costallocation, event.type, usage,ratecard.price, filter
| fieldsAdd cost = usage[] * toDouble(ratecard.price) 

 | summarize {
        total_usage = sum(usage[]),
        total_cost = sum(cost[])},
        by: { timeframe, interval, event.type }
| sort event.type

50.title: Estimated cost distribution per Capability
50.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT"
| filterOut event.type =="Traces - Ingest & Process" //traces need special handling
| dedup event.id
| filter in(event.type, {$Capability})
| fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
| fieldsAdd costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation), $unassigned, else: costallocation)
| fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
| expand costallocation
| fieldsAdd filter = coalesce(costallocation[key], costallocation)
| filter in(filter, {$Filter})
| fieldsAdd billed_bytes = coalesce(costallocation[billed_bytes], billed_bytes)
| fieldsAdd usage = coalesce(
    billed_host_hours, //Infra, F&D
    billed_gibibyte_hours, //Fullstack, Runtime Application Protection, Runtime Vulnerability Analytics
    toDouble(billed_bytes) / (1024*1024*1024), //ALL I/R/Q
    billed_invocations, //AppEngine
    ingested_bytes,
    1 //workflow count
    )
| fieldsAdd usage.start = if(isNull(usage.start), timestamp, else: usage.start)
| makeTimeseries interval: 15m, time: usage.start,nonempty:false, by:{filter, event.type },{
  usage = sum(usage)
}
| append [
// THIS IS JUST FOR TRACES INGEST NORMALIZATION ----->


      FETCH dt.system.events
      | filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and event.type == "Traces - Ingest & Process"
      | filter in(event.type, {$Capability})
      | fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
      | fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
      | fieldsAdd filter = costallocation
      | filter in(filter, {$Filter})
      | fieldsKeep usage.start, licensing_type, ingested_bytes, costallocation, event.id
      | dedup event.id
      | fieldsAdd licensing_type = if(in(licensing_type, {
        "otlp-trace-ingest", "serverless"}), "other", else: licensing_type)
      
      | fieldsAdd adaptive_volume = if(licensing_type == "fullstack-adaptive", ingested_bytes)
      | fieldsAdd fixed_rate_volume = if(licensing_type == "fullstack-fixed-rate", ingested_bytes)
      | fieldsAdd other_volume = if(licensing_type == "other", ingested_bytes)
    
      | fieldsAdd costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation), $unassigned, else: costallocation)
      
      | makeTimeseries interval: 15m, time: usage.start, by: {
        costallocation}, nonempty: true, {
        adaptive_volume = sum(adaptive_volume, default: 0),
        fixed_rate_volume = sum(fixed_rate_volume, default: 0),
        other_volume = sum(other_volume, default: 0)
      }
      
        // calculate included volume per costcenter and join with trace-ingest usage
      | join [
          FETCH dt.system.events
          | filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT"
          | filter event.type == "Full-Stack Monitoring"
          | fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
          | fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
          | fieldsKeep usage.start, billed_gibibyte_hours, costallocation, event.id
          | dedup event.id
          | makeTimeseries {
            billed = sum(billed_gibibyte_hours) }, by: {
            costallocation }, time: usage.start, interval: 15m
          | summarize by: {
            timeframe, interval }, {
            total = sum(billed[]), r = collectArray(record(costallocation, billed)) }
          | expand r
          | fieldsFlatten r, fields: {
            costallocation, billed }
          | fieldsAdd ratio = billed[] / total[]
          | fields timeframe, interval, costallocation, ratio
          | join [
              timeseries interval: 15m, union: true, nonempty: true, {
                included_volume = max(dt.billing.traces.maximum_included_fullstack_volume_per_minute, default: null),
                configured_volume = max(dt.billing.traces.maximum_configured_fullstack_volume_per_minute, default: null)
              }
              | fieldsAdd interval_in_minutes = toLong(interval) / 60000000000
              | fieldsAdd extra_ingest_on = configured_volume[] > included_volume[]
              | fieldsAdd included_volume = interval_in_minutes * if(isNull(configured_volume[]), null, else: included_volume[])
          ], on: {
            timeframe, interval }, fields: {
            included_volume, extra_ingest_on }
          | fieldsAdd included_volume_costallocation = included_volume[] * ratio[]
          | fieldsAdd costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation), $unassigned, else: costallocation)
      ], on: {
        timeframe, interval, costallocation }, kind: outer, prefix: "included."
      
      | fieldsAdd timeframe = coalesce(timeframe, included.timeframe)
      | fieldsAdd interval = coalesce(interval, included.interval)
      | fieldsAdd costallocation = coalesce(costallocation, included.costallocation)
      | fieldsAdd
          extra_ingest_on =
              if(exists(included.extra_ingest_on) and isNotNull(included.extra_ingest_on), included.extra_ingest_on,
                else: array(false, false, false, false))
      
      | fieldsAdd included_volume_costallocation = included.included_volume_costallocation
        // replace nulls with 0
      | fieldsAdd adaptive_volume = iCollectArray(coalesce(adaptive_volume[], 0))
      | fieldsAdd fixed_rate_volume = iCollectArray(coalesce(fixed_rate_volume[], 0))
      | fieldsAdd other_volume = iCollectArray(coalesce(other_volume[], 0))
      
      | fieldsKeep timeframe, interval, costallocation, adaptive_volume, fixed_rate_volume, other_volume,
          included_volume_costallocation, extra_ingest_on
      
        // calculate fullstack trace-ingest usage per costcenter
      | fieldsAdd license_remaining = included_volume_costallocation[] - adaptive_volume[]
      | fieldsAdd license_remaining = if(license_remaining[] > 0, license_remaining[], else: 0)
      
      | fieldsAdd
          billable_fullstack =
              if(isNull(included_volume_costallocation[]), 0,
                else: if(extra_ingest_on[], adaptive_volume[] + fixed_rate_volume[] - included_volume_costallocation[],
                  else: fixed_rate_volume[] - license_remaining[]))
      
      | fieldsAdd billable_fullstack = if(billable_fullstack[] > 0, billable_fullstack[], else: 0)
      
      | summarize {
        total_included = sum(included_volume_costallocation[]),
        total_adaptive = sum(adaptive_volume[]),
        total_fixed_rate = sum(fixed_rate_volume[]),
        total_fullstack_to_allocate = sum(billable_fullstack[]),
        per_costallocation = collectArray(record(extra_ingest_on, billable_fullstack, billable_other = other_volume, costallocation, included_volume_costallocation))}, 
        by: { timeframe, interval }
      | expand per_costallocation
      | fieldsFlatten per_costallocation
      | fieldsRemove per_costallocation
      
      | fieldsAdd total_license_remaining = total_included[] - total_adaptive[]
      | fieldsAdd total_license_remaining = if(total_license_remaining[] > 0, total_license_remaining[], else: 0)
      | fieldsAdd
          total_applicable_fullstack =
              if(isNull(per_costallocation.included_volume_costallocation), 0,
                else: if(per_costallocation.extra_ingest_on[], total_adaptive[] + total_fixed_rate[] - total_included[],
                  else: total_fixed_rate[] - total_license_remaining[]))
      | fieldsAdd total_billable_fullstack = if(total_applicable_fullstack[] > 0, total_applicable_fullstack[], else: 0)
      
      | fieldsAdd
          distributed_fullstack =
              if(total_fullstack_to_allocate[] <= 0, 0,
                else: per_costallocation.billable_fullstack[] / total_fullstack_to_allocate[] * total_billable_fullstack[])
      // filter out  entry if the included was not fetched
      | fieldsAdd
          adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation =
              per_costallocation.billable_other[] + if(total_included[] == 0, null, else: toDouble(distributed_fullstack[]))
      | filterOut isNull(adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation)
      
      | fields timeframe, interval, costallocation = per_costallocation.costallocation, adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation
      | fieldsAdd event.type ="Traces - Ingest & Process"
      | fieldsAdd filter = costallocation
]
| fieldsAdd traces_usage = adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation[] / (1024*1024*1024)
// <---------THIS IS JUST FOR TRACES INGEST NORMALIZATION 
| lookup [
   data json:$ratecard_data
], sourceField:event.type, lookupField:name, prefix: "ratecard."
| fieldsAdd isnull = isNull(adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation)
| fieldsAdd usage = if(isnull, usage, else: traces_usage)
| fieldsKeep timeframe, interval, costallocation, event.type, usage,ratecard.price, filter
| fieldsAdd cost = usage[] * toDouble(ratecard.price)
| fieldsAdd cost = arraySum(cost)
| fieldsAdd usage = arraySum(usage)
| summarize {total_usage=sum(usage), total_cost=sum(cost)}, by:{capability=event.type}

52.title: List of usage and estimated costs per Capability and Cost Center
52.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT"
| filterOut event.type =="Traces - Ingest & Process" //traces need special handling
| dedup event.id
| filter in(event.type, {$Capability})
| fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
| fieldsAdd costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation), $unassigned, else: costallocation)
| fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
| expand costallocation
| fieldsAdd filter = coalesce(costallocation[key], costallocation)
| filter in(filter, {$Filter})
| fieldsAdd billed_bytes = coalesce(costallocation[billed_bytes], billed_bytes)
| fieldsAdd usage = coalesce(
    billed_host_hours, //Infra, F&D
    billed_gibibyte_hours, //Fullstack, Runtime Application Protection, Runtime Vulnerability Analytics
    toDouble(billed_bytes) / (1024*1024*1024), //ALL I/R/Q
    billed_invocations, //AppEngine
    ingested_bytes,
    1 //workflow count
    )
| fieldsAdd usage.start = if(isNull(usage.start), timestamp, else: usage.start)
| makeTimeseries interval: 15m, time: usage.start, nonempty:false, by:{filter, event.type },{
  usage = sum(usage)
}
| append [
// THIS IS JUST FOR TRACES INGEST NORMALIZATION ----->


      FETCH dt.system.events
      | filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and event.type == "Traces - Ingest & Process"
      | filter in(event.type, {$Capability})
      | fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
      | fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
      | fieldsAdd filter = costallocation
      | filter in(filter, {$Filter})
      | fieldsKeep usage.start, licensing_type, ingested_bytes, costallocation, event.id
      | dedup event.id
      | fieldsAdd licensing_type = if(in(licensing_type, {
        "otlp-trace-ingest", "serverless"}), "other", else: licensing_type)
      
      | fieldsAdd adaptive_volume = if(licensing_type == "fullstack-adaptive", ingested_bytes)
      | fieldsAdd fixed_rate_volume = if(licensing_type == "fullstack-fixed-rate", ingested_bytes)
      | fieldsAdd other_volume = if(licensing_type == "other", ingested_bytes)
    
      | fieldsAdd costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation), $unassigned, else: costallocation)
      
      | makeTimeseries interval: 15m, time: usage.start, by: {
        costallocation}, nonempty: true, {
        adaptive_volume = sum(adaptive_volume, default: 0),
        fixed_rate_volume = sum(fixed_rate_volume, default: 0),
        other_volume = sum(other_volume, default: 0)
      }
      
        // calculate included volume per costcenter and join with trace-ingest usage
      | join [
          FETCH dt.system.events
          | filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT"
          | filter event.type == "Full-Stack Monitoring"
          | fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
          | fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
          | fieldsKeep usage.start, billed_gibibyte_hours, costallocation, event.id
          | dedup event.id
          | makeTimeseries {
            billed = sum(billed_gibibyte_hours) }, by: {
            costallocation }, time: usage.start, interval: 15m
          | summarize by: {
            timeframe, interval }, {
            total = sum(billed[]), r = collectArray(record(costallocation, billed)) }
          | expand r
          | fieldsFlatten r, fields: {
            costallocation, billed }
          | fieldsAdd ratio = billed[] / total[]
          | fields timeframe, interval, costallocation, ratio
          | join [
              timeseries interval: 15m, union: true, nonempty: true, {
                included_volume = max(dt.billing.traces.maximum_included_fullstack_volume_per_minute, default: null),
                configured_volume = max(dt.billing.traces.maximum_configured_fullstack_volume_per_minute, default: null)
              }
              | fieldsAdd interval_in_minutes = toLong(interval) / 60000000000
              | fieldsAdd extra_ingest_on = configured_volume[] > included_volume[]
              | fieldsAdd included_volume = interval_in_minutes * if(isNull(configured_volume[]), null, else: included_volume[])
          ], on: {
            timeframe, interval }, fields: {
            included_volume, extra_ingest_on }
          | fieldsAdd included_volume_costallocation = included_volume[] * ratio[]
          | fieldsAdd costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation), $unassigned, else: costallocation)
      ], on: {
        timeframe, interval, costallocation }, kind: outer, prefix: "included."
      
      | fieldsAdd timeframe = coalesce(timeframe, included.timeframe)
      | fieldsAdd interval = coalesce(interval, included.interval)
      | fieldsAdd costallocation = coalesce(costallocation, included.costallocation)
      | fieldsAdd
          extra_ingest_on =
              if(exists(included.extra_ingest_on) and isNotNull(included.extra_ingest_on), included.extra_ingest_on,
                else: array(false, false, false, false))
      
      | fieldsAdd included_volume_costallocation = included.included_volume_costallocation
        // replace nulls with 0
      | fieldsAdd adaptive_volume = iCollectArray(coalesce(adaptive_volume[], 0))
      | fieldsAdd fixed_rate_volume = iCollectArray(coalesce(fixed_rate_volume[], 0))
      | fieldsAdd other_volume = iCollectArray(coalesce(other_volume[], 0))
      
      | fieldsKeep timeframe, interval, costallocation, adaptive_volume, fixed_rate_volume, other_volume,
          included_volume_costallocation, extra_ingest_on
      
        // calculate fullstack trace-ingest usage per costcenter
      | fieldsAdd license_remaining = included_volume_costallocation[] - adaptive_volume[]
      | fieldsAdd license_remaining = if(license_remaining[] > 0, license_remaining[], else: 0)
      
      | fieldsAdd
          billable_fullstack =
              if(isNull(included_volume_costallocation[]), 0,
                else: if(extra_ingest_on[], adaptive_volume[] + fixed_rate_volume[] - included_volume_costallocation[],
                  else: fixed_rate_volume[] - license_remaining[]))
      
      | fieldsAdd billable_fullstack = if(billable_fullstack[] > 0, billable_fullstack[], else: 0)
      
      | summarize {
        total_included = sum(included_volume_costallocation[]),
        total_adaptive = sum(adaptive_volume[]),
        total_fixed_rate = sum(fixed_rate_volume[]),
        total_fullstack_to_allocate = sum(billable_fullstack[]),
        per_costallocation = collectArray(record(extra_ingest_on, billable_fullstack, billable_other = other_volume, costallocation, included_volume_costallocation))}, 
        by: { timeframe, interval }
      | expand per_costallocation
      | fieldsFlatten per_costallocation
      | fieldsRemove per_costallocation
      
      | fieldsAdd total_license_remaining = total_included[] - total_adaptive[]
      | fieldsAdd total_license_remaining = if(total_license_remaining[] > 0, total_license_remaining[], else: 0)
      | fieldsAdd
          total_applicable_fullstack =
              if(isNull(per_costallocation.included_volume_costallocation), 0,
                else: if(per_costallocation.extra_ingest_on[], total_adaptive[] + total_fixed_rate[] - total_included[],
                  else: total_fixed_rate[] - total_license_remaining[]))
      | fieldsAdd total_billable_fullstack = if(total_applicable_fullstack[] > 0, total_applicable_fullstack[], else: 0)
      
      | fieldsAdd
          distributed_fullstack =
              if(total_fullstack_to_allocate[] <= 0, 0,
                else: per_costallocation.billable_fullstack[] / total_fullstack_to_allocate[] * total_billable_fullstack[])
      // filter out  entry if the included was not fetched
      | fieldsAdd
          adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation =
              per_costallocation.billable_other[] + if(total_included[] == 0, null, else: toDouble(distributed_fullstack[]))
      | filterOut isNull(adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation)
      
      | fields timeframe, interval, costallocation = per_costallocation.costallocation, adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation
      | fieldsAdd event.type ="Traces - Ingest & Process"
      | fieldsAdd filter = costallocation
]
| fieldsAdd traces_usage = adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation[] / (1024*1024*1024)
// <---------THIS IS JUST FOR TRACES INGEST NORMALIZATION 

| lookup [
   data json:$ratecard_data
], sourceField:event.type, lookupField:name, prefix: "ratecard."
| fieldsAdd isnull = isNull(adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation)
| fieldsAdd usage = if(isnull, usage, else: traces_usage)
| fieldsKeep timeframe, interval, costallocation, event.type, usage,ratecard.price, filter
| fieldsAdd cost = usage[] * toDouble(ratecard.price)
| fieldsAdd cost = arraySum(cost)
| fieldsAdd usage = arraySum(usage)
| summarize {total_usage=sum(usage), total_cost=sum(cost)}, by:{capability=event.type,filter}
| sort total_cost desc

56.content:
## Change Log
* v 3: Branched a version w/o lookup tables to ensure no related costs
* v 3.1: dedup events 
* v 3.2: fixed some overlooked lookup table references
* v 3.3: Adjusted for Log Retain/RwiQ & Fixed Trace Ingest billed usage

57.title: Estimated cost distribution per cost center
57.description: Showing only values above 5% of total costs
57.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT"
| filterOut event.type =="Traces - Ingest & Process" //traces need special handling
| dedup event.id
| filter in(event.type, {$Capability})
| fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
| fieldsAdd costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation), $unassigned, else: costallocation)
| fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
| expand costallocation
| fieldsAdd filter = coalesce(costallocation[key], costallocation)
| filter in(filter, {$Filter})
| fieldsAdd billed_bytes = coalesce(costallocation[billed_bytes], billed_bytes)
| fieldsAdd usage = coalesce(
    billed_host_hours, //Infra, F&D
    billed_gibibyte_hours, //Fullstack, Runtime Application Protection, Runtime Vulnerability Analytics
    toDouble(billed_bytes) / (1024*1024*1024), //ALL I/R/Q
    billed_invocations, //AppEngine
    ingested_bytes,
    1 //workflow count
    )
| fieldsAdd usage.start = if(isNull(usage.start), timestamp, else: usage.start)
| makeTimeseries interval: 15m, time: usage.start, nonempty:false, by:{filter, event.type },{
  usage = sum(usage)
}
| append [
// THIS IS JUST FOR TRACES INGEST NORMALIZATION ----->


      FETCH dt.system.events
      | filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and event.type == "Traces - Ingest & Process"
      | filter in(event.type, {$Capability})
      | fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
      | fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
      | fieldsAdd filter = costallocation
      | filter in(filter, {$Filter})
      | fieldsKeep usage.start, licensing_type, ingested_bytes, costallocation, event.id
      | dedup event.id
      | fieldsAdd licensing_type = if(in(licensing_type, {
        "otlp-trace-ingest", "serverless"}), "other", else: licensing_type)
      
      | fieldsAdd adaptive_volume = if(licensing_type == "fullstack-adaptive", ingested_bytes)
      | fieldsAdd fixed_rate_volume = if(licensing_type == "fullstack-fixed-rate", ingested_bytes)
      | fieldsAdd other_volume = if(licensing_type == "other", ingested_bytes)
    
      | fieldsAdd costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation), $unassigned, else: costallocation)
      
      | makeTimeseries interval: 15m, time: usage.start, by: {
        costallocation}, nonempty: true, {
        adaptive_volume = sum(adaptive_volume, default: 0),
        fixed_rate_volume = sum(fixed_rate_volume, default: 0),
        other_volume = sum(other_volume, default: 0)
      }
      
        // calculate included volume per costcenter and join with trace-ingest usage
      | join [
          FETCH dt.system.events
          | filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT"
          | filter event.type == "Full-Stack Monitoring"
          | fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
          | fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
          | fieldsKeep usage.start, billed_gibibyte_hours, costallocation, event.id
          | dedup event.id
          | makeTimeseries {
            billed = sum(billed_gibibyte_hours) }, by: {
            costallocation }, time: usage.start, interval: 15m
          | summarize by: {
            timeframe, interval }, {
            total = sum(billed[]), r = collectArray(record(costallocation, billed)) }
          | expand r
          | fieldsFlatten r, fields: {
            costallocation, billed }
          | fieldsAdd ratio = billed[] / total[]
          | fields timeframe, interval, costallocation, ratio
          | join [
              timeseries interval: 15m, union: true, nonempty: true, {
                included_volume = max(dt.billing.traces.maximum_included_fullstack_volume_per_minute, default: null),
                configured_volume = max(dt.billing.traces.maximum_configured_fullstack_volume_per_minute, default: null)
              }
              | fieldsAdd interval_in_minutes = toLong(interval) / 60000000000
              | fieldsAdd extra_ingest_on = configured_volume[] > included_volume[]
              | fieldsAdd included_volume = interval_in_minutes * if(isNull(configured_volume[]), null, else: included_volume[])
          ], on: {
            timeframe, interval }, fields: {
            included_volume, extra_ingest_on }
          | fieldsAdd included_volume_costallocation = included_volume[] * ratio[]
          | fieldsAdd costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation), $unassigned, else: costallocation)
      ], on: {
        timeframe, interval, costallocation }, kind: outer, prefix: "included."
      
      | fieldsAdd timeframe = coalesce(timeframe, included.timeframe)
      | fieldsAdd interval = coalesce(interval, included.interval)
      | fieldsAdd costallocation = coalesce(costallocation, included.costallocation)
      | fieldsAdd
          extra_ingest_on =
              if(exists(included.extra_ingest_on) and isNotNull(included.extra_ingest_on), included.extra_ingest_on,
                else: array(false, false, false, false))
      
      | fieldsAdd included_volume_costallocation = included.included_volume_costallocation
        // replace nulls with 0
      | fieldsAdd adaptive_volume = iCollectArray(coalesce(adaptive_volume[], 0))
      | fieldsAdd fixed_rate_volume = iCollectArray(coalesce(fixed_rate_volume[], 0))
      | fieldsAdd other_volume = iCollectArray(coalesce(other_volume[], 0))
      
      | fieldsKeep timeframe, interval, costallocation, adaptive_volume, fixed_rate_volume, other_volume,
          included_volume_costallocation, extra_ingest_on
      
        // calculate fullstack trace-ingest usage per costcenter
      | fieldsAdd license_remaining = included_volume_costallocation[] - adaptive_volume[]
      | fieldsAdd license_remaining = if(license_remaining[] > 0, license_remaining[], else: 0)
      
      | fieldsAdd
          billable_fullstack =
              if(isNull(included_volume_costallocation[]), 0,
                else: if(extra_ingest_on[], adaptive_volume[] + fixed_rate_volume[] - included_volume_costallocation[],
                  else: fixed_rate_volume[] - license_remaining[]))
      
      | fieldsAdd billable_fullstack = if(billable_fullstack[] > 0, billable_fullstack[], else: 0)
      
      | summarize {
        total_included = sum(included_volume_costallocation[]),
        total_adaptive = sum(adaptive_volume[]),
        total_fixed_rate = sum(fixed_rate_volume[]),
        total_fullstack_to_allocate = sum(billable_fullstack[]),
        per_costallocation = collectArray(record(extra_ingest_on, billable_fullstack, billable_other = other_volume, costallocation, included_volume_costallocation))}, 
        by: { timeframe, interval }
      | expand per_costallocation
      | fieldsFlatten per_costallocation
      | fieldsRemove per_costallocation
      
      | fieldsAdd total_license_remaining = total_included[] - total_adaptive[]
      | fieldsAdd total_license_remaining = if(total_license_remaining[] > 0, total_license_remaining[], else: 0)
      | fieldsAdd
          total_applicable_fullstack =
              if(isNull(per_costallocation.included_volume_costallocation), 0,
                else: if(per_costallocation.extra_ingest_on[], total_adaptive[] + total_fixed_rate[] - total_included[],
                  else: total_fixed_rate[] - total_license_remaining[]))
      | fieldsAdd total_billable_fullstack = if(total_applicable_fullstack[] > 0, total_applicable_fullstack[], else: 0)
      
      | fieldsAdd
          distributed_fullstack =
              if(total_fullstack_to_allocate[] <= 0, 0,
                else: per_costallocation.billable_fullstack[] / total_fullstack_to_allocate[] * total_billable_fullstack[])
      // filter out  entry if the included was not fetched
      | fieldsAdd
          adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation =
              per_costallocation.billable_other[] + if(total_included[] == 0, null, else: toDouble(distributed_fullstack[]))
      | filterOut isNull(adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation)
      
      | fields timeframe, interval, costallocation = per_costallocation.costallocation, adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation
      | fieldsAdd event.type ="Traces - Ingest & Process"
      | fieldsAdd filter = costallocation
]
| fieldsAdd traces_usage = adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation[] / (1024*1024*1024)
// <---------THIS IS JUST FOR TRACES INGEST NORMALIZATION 


| lookup [
   data json:$ratecard_data
], sourceField:event.type, lookupField:name, prefix: "ratecard."
| fieldsAdd isnull = isNull(adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation)
| fieldsAdd usage = if(isnull, usage, else: traces_usage)
| fieldsKeep timeframe, interval, costallocation, event.type, usage,ratecard.price, filter
| fieldsAdd cost = usage[] * toDouble(ratecard.price)
| fieldsAdd cost = arraySum(cost)
| fieldsAdd usage = arraySum(usage)
| summarize {total_usage=sum(usage), total_cost=sum(cost)}, by:{filter}
| sort total_cost desc

58.title: Used Ratecard (can be changed by editing the ratecard_data variable <---)

60.title: Estimated cost distribution per Capability
60.query:
fetch dt.system.events
| filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT"
| filterOut event.type =="Traces - Ingest & Process" //traces need special handling
| dedup event.id
| filter in(event.type, {$Capability})
| fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
| fieldsAdd costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation), $unassigned, else: costallocation)
| fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
| expand costallocation
| fieldsAdd filter = coalesce(costallocation[key], costallocation)
| filter in(filter, {$Filter})
| fieldsAdd billed_bytes = coalesce(costallocation[billed_bytes], billed_bytes)
| fieldsAdd usage = coalesce(
    billed_host_hours, //Infra, F&D
    billed_gibibyte_hours, //Fullstack, Runtime Application Protection, Runtime Vulnerability Analytics
    toDouble(billed_bytes) / (1024*1024*1024), //ALL I/R/Q
    billed_invocations, //AppEngine
    ingested_bytes,
    1 //workflow count
    )
| fieldsAdd usage.start = if(isNull(usage.start), timestamp, else: usage.start)
| makeTimeseries interval: 15m, time: usage.start, nonempty:false, by:{filter, event.type },{
  usage = sum(usage)
}
| append [
// THIS IS JUST FOR TRACES INGEST NORMALIZATION ----->


      FETCH dt.system.events
      | filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT" and event.type == "Traces - Ingest & Process"
      | filter in(event.type, {$Capability})
      | fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
      | fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
      | fieldsAdd filter = costallocation
      | filter in(filter, {$Filter})
      | fieldsKeep usage.start, licensing_type, ingested_bytes, costallocation, event.id
      | dedup event.id
      | fieldsAdd licensing_type = if(in(licensing_type, {
        "otlp-trace-ingest", "serverless"}), "other", else: licensing_type)
      
      | fieldsAdd adaptive_volume = if(licensing_type == "fullstack-adaptive", ingested_bytes)
      | fieldsAdd fixed_rate_volume = if(licensing_type == "fullstack-fixed-rate", ingested_bytes)
      | fieldsAdd other_volume = if(licensing_type == "other", ingested_bytes)
    
      | fieldsAdd costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation), $unassigned, else: costallocation)
      
      | makeTimeseries interval: 15m, time: usage.start, by: {
        costallocation}, nonempty: true, {
        adaptive_volume = sum(adaptive_volume, default: 0),
        fixed_rate_volume = sum(fixed_rate_volume, default: 0),
        other_volume = sum(other_volume, default: 0)
      }
      
        // calculate included volume per costcenter and join with trace-ingest usage
      | join [
          FETCH dt.system.events
          | filter event.kind == "BILLING_USAGE_EVENT"
          | filter event.type == "Full-Stack Monitoring"
          | fieldsAdd costallocation = if($CostAllocation=="costcenter",dt.cost.costcenter, else: dt.cost.product)
          | fieldsRemove dt.cost.costcenter, dt.cost.product
          | fieldsKeep usage.start, billed_gibibyte_hours, costallocation, event.id
          | dedup event.id
          | makeTimeseries {
            billed = sum(billed_gibibyte_hours) }, by: {
            costallocation }, time: usage.start, interval: 15m
          | summarize by: {
            timeframe, interval }, {
            total = sum(billed[]), r = collectArray(record(costallocation, billed)) }
          | expand r
          | fieldsFlatten r, fields: {
            costallocation, billed }
          | fieldsAdd ratio = billed[] / total[]
          | fields timeframe, interval, costallocation, ratio
          | join [
              timeseries interval: 15m, union: true, nonempty: true, {
                included_volume = max(dt.billing.traces.maximum_included_fullstack_volume_per_minute, default: null),
                configured_volume = max(dt.billing.traces.maximum_configured_fullstack_volume_per_minute, default: null)
              }
              | fieldsAdd interval_in_minutes = toLong(interval) / 60000000000
              | fieldsAdd extra_ingest_on = configured_volume[] > included_volume[]
              | fieldsAdd included_volume = interval_in_minutes * if(isNull(configured_volume[]), null, else: included_volume[])
          ], on: {
            timeframe, interval }, fields: {
            included_volume, extra_ingest_on }
          | fieldsAdd included_volume_costallocation = included_volume[] * ratio[]
          | fieldsAdd costallocation = if(isNull(costallocation), $unassigned, else: costallocation)
      ], on: {
        timeframe, interval, costallocation }, kind: outer, prefix: "included."
      
      | fieldsAdd timeframe = coalesce(timeframe, included.timeframe)
      | fieldsAdd interval = coalesce(interval, included.interval)
      | fieldsAdd costallocation = coalesce(costallocation, included.costallocation)
      | fieldsAdd
          extra_ingest_on =
              if(exists(included.extra_ingest_on) and isNotNull(included.extra_ingest_on), included.extra_ingest_on,
                else: array(false, false, false, false))
      
      | fieldsAdd included_volume_costallocation = included.included_volume_costallocation
        // replace nulls with 0
      | fieldsAdd adaptive_volume = iCollectArray(coalesce(adaptive_volume[], 0))
      | fieldsAdd fixed_rate_volume = iCollectArray(coalesce(fixed_rate_volume[], 0))
      | fieldsAdd other_volume = iCollectArray(coalesce(other_volume[], 0))
      
      | fieldsKeep timeframe, interval, costallocation, adaptive_volume, fixed_rate_volume, other_volume,
          included_volume_costallocation, extra_ingest_on
      
        // calculate fullstack trace-ingest usage per costcenter
      | fieldsAdd license_remaining = included_volume_costallocation[] - adaptive_volume[]
      | fieldsAdd license_remaining = if(license_remaining[] > 0, license_remaining[], else: 0)
      
      | fieldsAdd
          billable_fullstack =
              if(isNull(included_volume_costallocation[]), 0,
                else: if(extra_ingest_on[], adaptive_volume[] + fixed_rate_volume[] - included_volume_costallocation[],
                  else: fixed_rate_volume[] - license_remaining[]))
      
      | fieldsAdd billable_fullstack = if(billable_fullstack[] > 0, billable_fullstack[], else: 0)
      
      | summarize {
        total_included = sum(included_volume_costallocation[]),
        total_adaptive = sum(adaptive_volume[]),
        total_fixed_rate = sum(fixed_rate_volume[]),
        total_fullstack_to_allocate = sum(billable_fullstack[]),
        per_costallocation = collectArray(record(extra_ingest_on, billable_fullstack, billable_other = other_volume, costallocation, included_volume_costallocation))}, 
        by: { timeframe, interval }
      | expand per_costallocation
      | fieldsFlatten per_costallocation
      | fieldsRemove per_costallocation
      
      | fieldsAdd total_license_remaining = total_included[] - total_adaptive[]
      | fieldsAdd total_license_remaining = if(total_license_remaining[] > 0, total_license_remaining[], else: 0)
      | fieldsAdd
          total_applicable_fullstack =
              if(isNull(per_costallocation.included_volume_costallocation), 0,
                else: if(per_costallocation.extra_ingest_on[], total_adaptive[] + total_fixed_rate[] - total_included[],
                  else: total_fixed_rate[] - total_license_remaining[]))
      | fieldsAdd total_billable_fullstack = if(total_applicable_fullstack[] > 0, total_applicable_fullstack[], else: 0)
      
      | fieldsAdd
          distributed_fullstack =
              if(total_fullstack_to_allocate[] <= 0, 0,
                else: per_costallocation.billable_fullstack[] / total_fullstack_to_allocate[] * total_billable_fullstack[])
      // filter out  entry if the included was not fetched
      | fieldsAdd
          adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation =
              per_costallocation.billable_other[] + if(total_included[] == 0, null, else: toDouble(distributed_fullstack[]))
      | filterOut isNull(adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation)
      
      | fields timeframe, interval, costallocation = per_costallocation.costallocation, adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation
      | fieldsAdd event.type ="Traces - Ingest & Process"
      | fieldsAdd filter = costallocation
]
| fieldsAdd traces_usage = adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation[] / (1024*1024*1024)
// <---------THIS IS JUST FOR TRACES INGEST NORMALIZATION 

| lookup [
   data json:$ratecard_data
], sourceField:event.type, lookupField:name, prefix: "ratecard."
| fieldsAdd isnull = isNull(adjusted_billable_total_per_costallocation)
| fieldsAdd usage = if(isnull, usage, else: traces_usage)
| fieldsKeep timeframe, interval, costallocation, event.type, usage,ratecard.price, filter
| fieldsAdd cost = usage[] * toDouble(ratecard.price)
| fieldsAdd cost = arraySum(cost)
| fieldsAdd usage = arraySum(usage)
| summarize {total_usage=sum(usage), total_cost=sum(cost)}

61.content: *shown trace usage also includes included, non billable usage. The calculation for billable Traces cannot be done on record level. Therefore costs cannot be calculated within this table. For the Trace Ingest usage and costs which is billable - check the other tiles please.
